ddt:Target.Name: CMF1_BCM_DDT_5_3
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DIESE/65690/Séction BCM/UET Modélisation)
2009.09.30 - Creation

Data.Name: Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Item.Text: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: END_ALWAYS_PRESENT_DISTANCE_TP
Data.Comment: TB (17/09/12) Valeur par défaut mise à jour suite à évol CDC pour ST3.

Item.Text: ended NOK 0x04 pb writing codes in CID or BCM memory
ended NOK 0x05 CID blank or not of vehicle
ended NOK 0x06 CID already paired in this procedure
ended NOK 0x0C pb storage pairing context in CID
ended NOK 0x0D time out CID pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Routine to pair Restricted Access Card whereas 1 already paired
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok CID blank for ECU pairing or CID not belonging to the vehicle for ECU or CID pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID blank or not belonging to the vehicle
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok CID blank not the one pre-presented
rep nok CID not belonging to the vehicle

DataItem.Name: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB

Label.Text: CID Information - Select "StartRoutine" and press the button
To start permanent authent, select "StartRoutine" and press the button :
To stop permanent authent, select "StopRoutine" and press the button:

Screen.Name: Factory Rework BCM or CID PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : BCM or Customer ID pairing
Procedure : (To quit immediately the Pairing mode, press the button "ABANDON"
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 16 bytes), select "StartRoutine" and press the button "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for BCM pairing is launched, then approach a customer ID belonging to the vehicle to the Kazashi ring or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
CID ANALYSE - Select "StartRoutine" and press the button
3) Select"StartRoutine" and press the button "Pairing" to pair a customer ID
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then approach a customer ID (belonging to the vehicle or blank) to the Kazashi ring or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
3) Select "StartRoutine" and press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the BCM
4) If the BCM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic. Then pair all the customers IDs (procedure in right)

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Label.Text: FACTORY PAIRING of ESCL or ECM (Rework)

The pairing of the ESCL or ECM in factory is done automatically once the BCM and the customer IDs have been paired after the press on the push to start of the vehicle or after the switch to Ignition Power Supply ON
Protected Pairing : BCM pairing in After Sales
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
2) Press the button "Request Server BCM pairing"
3) Select the "Input Data Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
4) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"

5) If the BCM is SA unlocked for BCM pairing then approach the customer ID belonging to the vehicle to the Kazashi ring or switch Ignition Power Supply ON, select "startRoutine" and press the button "BCM pairing" to pair the blank BCM.
CID ANALYSE - Select "startRoutine" and press the button
After the pairing, the exit is automatic. If the BCM is not SA unlocked , press ABANDON
Protected Pairing : Electrical Steering Column Locked pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the BCM is not blank and the ESCL is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ESCL information "SteeringLock Blanck/coded"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ESCL pairing, then put the Ignition OFF, select "startRoutine" and press the button "Authorize ESCL pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then put the Ignition ON. If the ESCL is paired ( "blank_coded = false") the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ESCL, press the button
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
Select "requestRoutineResults" and click again on the button
Protected Pairing : Engine Control Module (ECM) pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " ECM_IS_BLANK"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF, select "startRoutine" and press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then switch Ignition Power Supply ON. If the ECM is paired, the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM, press the button
Select "requestRoutineResults" and click again on the button
DPC and PMU (boitiers de cde sur portes conducteur et passager)
